nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms after 5am. Mostly cloudy. Low around 75, with temperatures rising to around 78 overnight. South wind 12 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 24 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

nws.name: Wednesday
nws.shortForecast: Chance Showers And Thunderstorms then Mostly Sunny
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before 9am. Mostly sunny, with a high near 95. Southwest wind 13 to 17 mph, with gusts as high as 29 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws.name: Wednesday Night
nws.shortForecast: Partly Cloudy then Showers And Thunderstorms
nws.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms after 2am. Some of the storms could produce heavy rain. Partly cloudy. Low around 66, with temperatures rising to around 68 overnight. East northeast wind 3 to 16 mph, with gusts as high as 22 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts between a half and three quarters of an inch possible.

nws.name: Thursday
nws.shortForecast: Showers And Thunderstorms then Partly Sunny
nws.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms before 9am, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 9am and 10am, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 10am and noon. Some of the storms could produce heavy rain. Partly sunny, with a high near 81. North northeast wind 10 to 22 mph, with gusts as high as 32 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New rainfall amounts between three quarters and one inch possible.

nws.name: Thursday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Clear, with a low around 57. West northwest wind 6 to 18 mph, with gusts as high as 26 mph.

nws.name: Friday
nws.detailedForecast: Sunny, with a high near 88. Southwest wind 7 to 14 mph.

nws.name: Friday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly clear, with a low around 66. South wind 12 to 15 mph.

nws.name: Saturday
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms between 7am and 1pm, then showers and thunderstorms likely. Mostly sunny, with a high near 87. West southwest wind 9 to 14 mph.

nws.name: Saturday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely before 1am. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 60. North northeast wind 7 to 14 mph.

nws.name: Sunday
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly sunny, with a high near 76. North wind around 10 mph, with gusts as high as 20 mph.

nws.name: Sunday Night
nws.shortForecast: Slight Chance Rain Showers then Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers between 7pm and 1am, then a slight chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 55. North wind 2 to 8 mph.

nws.name: Monday
nws.shortForecast: Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms then Mostly Sunny
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms before 7am. Mostly sunny, with a high near 77. North northwest wind 3 to 7 mph.

nws.name: Monday Night
nws.shortForecast: Partly Cloudy then Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms after 1am. Partly cloudy, with a low around 56. West southwest wind 3 to 7 mph.

nws.name: Tuesday
nws.shortForecast: Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms then Mostly Sunny
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms before 7am. Mostly sunny, with a high near 81. West northwest wind 3 to 8 mph, with gusts as high as 17 mph.
